# Manifest of cmake-xray M6 Markdown report goldens (AP M6-1.2 Tranche A.3).
#
# Each non-comment, non-blank line names exactly one golden file in this
# directory. The doc_examples_validation gate (extended for AP 1.2 A.3)
# checks that manifest and directory contents agree.
#
# Coverage per plan-M6-1-2.md "E2E-/Golden-Tests":
#   analyze-compile-db-only.md  -> not_loaded, no Direct Target Dependencies / Target Hubs sections
#   analyze-file-api-loaded.md  -> loaded, populated Direct Target Dependencies + Target Hubs tables
#   analyze-file-api-partial.md -> partial, at least one external edge
#   impact-compile-db-only.md   -> not_loaded, no Target Graph Reference section
#   impact-file-api-loaded.md   -> loaded, populated Target Graph Reference table
#   impact-file-api-partial.md  -> partial, at least one external edge
#
# AP M6-1.4 A.5 step 25a (origin/depth coverage):
#   analyze-include-origin-mix.md                -> all four origin/depth_kind values
#   analyze-include-origin-mix-scope-project.md  -> include_hotspot_excluded_unknown_count > 0
#
# AP M6-1.4 A.6 step 27 follow-up (budget-reached coverage):
#   analyze-include-budget-reached.md            -> "Note: include analysis stopped at
#                                                   10000 nodes (budget reached)." line rendered.
